title: olsynium frigidum
intro: Olsynium frigidum, also known as the alpine lewisia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. The roots of the Olsynium frigidum plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's roots have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The roots of the Olsynium frigidum plant can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions.
